original_image_tags: The document is a single page of aged, off-white paper with typed text that is reversed (mirror image) because it is likely the back of another document or a carbon copy impression. The page has punched holes for filing and a metal clip remnant at the bottom left. There are blue stamps indicating receipt by government offices.

elements.description: Page appears to be the reverse side of a document with bleed-through text and two blue ink stamps. One stamp reads 'RECEIVED JUL 8 1 23 PM 1947' and 'INTERNAL SECURITY F.B.I. DEPT. OF JUSTICE'. Another stamp reads 'RECEIVED TELETYPE UNIT Jul 7 10 42 PM '47 F.B.I. DEPT. OF JUSTICE'. There are two punch holes and a torn piece of tape at the bottom.

judge.reason: Both agree on main visual content: reverse side with bleed-through text, two blue stamps, punch holes, and torn tape, but B provides specific quoted stamp text while A omits it without contradiction.
